Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11050 0 0}There's been a lot of talk lately about that Apathy Syndrome stuff...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I'm sure it won't affect those kids one bit. They're so excited about the race, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11083 0 0}I'm a little envious... since I don't really have anything I'm passionate about.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11069 0 0}Huh? Where'd that come from? I haven't given up. I just haven't found the right thing for me yet, that's all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 3 25 25}Sorry... You were just trying to cheer me up, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}What is with me today? Maybe I'm just nervous because the kids' race is coming up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko suddenly fell silent.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11081 0 0}{f 5 13 12 30 106}Y-You really think so? Thanks. Hearing that from you makes me feel a little better...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}I've just been so busy as team manager and as a coach for those kids... Not that I mind, of course.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}I don't have much free time these days, but... I dunno, it feels really... fulfilling, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko seems very happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11030 0 0}{f 5 13 12 15 106}Aw, c'mon... You're giving me way too much credit here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}But it does sound pretty cool to say that I'm both a team manager and a coach.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'll tell you what... If those kids win their big race, then you can sing my praises.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko looks a little embarrassed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about her today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}Okay, I think I'll pray for a little luck. I just want those kids to show how hard they've practiced.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11061 0 0}So, uh... if you don't mind, do you wanna visit the shrine with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After praying at the shrine with Yuko,[n]I decided to head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
